features.name: Admin Dashboard — pending approval count & user summary
done_criteria: Renders registered user count with pending approval badge
features.notes: Currently only renders PopularFoodsTrendCard. S-06 requires pending approval count + user summary.

features.name: ClientDirectory — overdue evaluation indicators
done_criteria: Highlights participants with >14 days since last evaluation
features.notes: S-16 spec: visual indicator for overdue participants. US-33.

features.name: Gizi Dashboard — overdue evaluation notifications
features.notes: S-05 requires overdue evaluation notifications. Currently missing from dashboard.

features.name: Klien Dashboard — remaining calories & trending food
features.notes: S-04 requires remaining calories + trending food. Currently missing.

features.name: Exercise Calorie — biometric adjustment in edge function
done_criteria: Fetches height, age, gender from profiles
AI prompt simplified to MET + duration only
Calories computed deterministically with biometric adjustments
features.notes: Approved spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-13-activity-calorie-ai-prompt-design.md. Currently AI computes calories; should use TypeScript instead.

features.name: Admin delete user — edge function not wired to UI
done_criteria: Only shown for users with is_active=false
features.notes: admin-delete-user edge function exists but no UI trigger. US-17.

features.name: Klien Progress — show evaluation history from nutritionist
features.notes: useUserEvaluations hook exists but not used on progress page. US-32.

features.name: ParticipantDetail — add exercise log history section
done_criteria: Shows exercise log entries below progress timeline
features.notes: S-11 spec requires exercise log history in participant profile. Currently missing.
